Barret Zoph is out at OpenAI again after just five months
items.description: Five months after returning to OpenAI, Barret Zoph - the company's head of enterprise AI sales - has departed, The Verge has learned. Zoph returned to OpenAI in mid-January after a stint as co-founder and CTO of Thinking Machines Lab, the competing AI company founded by former OpenAI CTO Mira Murati...

items.title: Valve is so behind on Steam Controller orders that some won’t ship until 2027
items.description: Valve has some good news and bad news about Steam Controllers.
